allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''metacubex_releases.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total releases:'', data.length\); console.log\(''\\nAll prerelease versions:''\); data.filter\(r=>r.prerelease\).forEach\(\(r,i\)=>console.log\(\(i+1\) + ''. '' + r.tag_name + '' | date: '' + r.published_at.split\(''T''\)[0]\)\)")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $cs = Get-Content ''electron/loopback-helper.cs'' -Raw; Add-Type -TypeDefinition $cs; Write-Output ''OK'' } catch { Write-Output $_Exception.Message }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $cs = Get-Content ''electron\\loopback-helper.cs'' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; Add-Type -TypeDefinition $cs; [NetworkIsolationHelper]::EnumAppContainers\(\).Substring\(0,200\) } catch { $_Exception.Message }")
